## Scope check

Unflincher is a single-user, self-hosted reflection tool. Requests to make it a hosted multi-user
service, add accounts, or add a public writable demo are out of scope.

## Privacy check

Do not paste real diary content, tokens, production hostnames, or private databases. Use fictional examples.
